workflows.name: YouTube Video Production Pipeline
workflows.description: Full automated pipeline from topic research to upload-ready video package. Includes trust gates for human review at critical checkpoints.

steps.label: Topic Research
steps.sop: Research topic using web search, validate with search volume, check competition density, identify unique angle. Output: YT_RESEARCH_{topic}_{date}.md

steps.label: Script Writing
steps.sop: Write 4-6 segment script (600-900 words each) following retention-optimized structure. Include B-roll notes and visual cues. Output: YT_SCRIPT_{topic}_{date}.md

steps.label: Script Review Gate
steps.sop: Human reviews script for tone, accuracy, and brand alignment. Approve, request revisions, or kill.

steps.label: Retention Analysis
steps.sop: Analyze script for retention risks. Flag weak hooks, missing pattern interrupts, long exposition. Provide before/after fixes. Output: YT_RETENTION_{topic}_{date}.md

steps.label: Storyboard Generation
steps.sop: Convert script segments into Remotion-compatible storyboard JSON. Each scene: scene_id, text, visual_type, keywords, duration_s, generation_prompt. Output: YT_STORYBOARD_{topic}_{date}.json

steps.label: Storyboard Review Gate
steps.sop: Human reviews storyboard for visual direction, pacing, and brand consistency. Approve or request changes.

steps.label: SEO Keyword Optimization
steps.sop: Generate optimized title (60 char), description (5000 char), tags (500 char), thumbnail text. Output: YT_SEO_{topic}_{date}.md

steps.label: Asset Sourcing
steps.sop: Source stock footage, generate stills, prepare text overlays based on storyboard JSON. Collect all assets into assets/{topic}/ directory.

steps.label: Video Render
steps.sop: Render video using Remotion with storyboard JSON and sourced assets. Apply music, transitions, text overlays. Output: renders/{topic}_{date}.mp4

steps.label: Quality Assessment
steps.sop: Score pipeline outputs: factual accuracy, narrative engagement, visual variety, SEO potential, production readiness (each 0-10). Provide go/no-go. Output: YT_ASSESSMENT_{topic}_{date}.md

steps.label: Pre-Upload Review Gate
steps.sop: Human reviews final assessment, watches rendered video, approves for upload or sends back for fixes.

steps.label: Upload Preparation
steps.sop: Prepare upload package: video file, thumbnail, title, description, tags, scheduled publish time. Output: upload_ready/{topic}_{date}/

script_review.description: Human approves script before retention analysis and production

storyboard_review.description: Human approves visual direction before asset sourcing and render

pre_upload.description: Human approves final quality assessment before upload preparation
